raw.reasoning: From Thursday, "Tuesday at 3pm" most naturally refers to the upcoming Tuesday at 3:00 PM, though the previous Tuesday is also a plausible reading.

“Feb 29” is a bare date without a year, so the most likely interpretation is the next occurrence after the anchor date, which is the next leap-day occurrence.
The bare date “April 30” most naturally refers to the current April 30 in the anchor’s cycle, which is still upcoming from the April 19, 2026 anchor.

This most likely refers to June 15 in the current yearly cycle relative to the June 9 anchor, though another year is still plausible without an explicit year.
